title: dev-core-busy/jarvis

title: EndoTheDev/OMeter
summary: Benchmark and compare Ollama models across local and cloud endpoints with rich, sortable tables.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: vicquick/nobrainr
summary: Persistent memory and knowledge graph for AI agents via MCP — PostgreSQL + pgvector + Ollama

title: Southland-Systems/mince
summary: MinCE (Minimal Context Engine) is a CLI AI assistant that can read and patch local files.  It sends a single request with specified file context to any OpenAI‑compatible endpoint and returns text or Structured Output.  It also plans and can walk codebases.

title: Fast-Editor/Lynkr
summary: Streamline your workflow with Lynkr, a CLI tool that acts as an HTTP proxy for efficient code interactions using Claude Code CLI.

title: smixs/iva
summary: AI assistant in Telegram that remembers everything and helps you run your life. Self-hosted in one command.

title: gonzaloMorenoc/Mnemo
summary: QA Continuity AI — a private, on-premise platform that turns scattered project knowledge (rules, flows, bugs, tests, CI) into test plans, Playwright automation, and searchable QA memory. 100% local LLMs via Ollama + HuggingFace, zero API cost.

title: JOhnsonKC201/Echo_FLOW
summary: Local-first voice dictation for Windows. Whisper transcription + on-device LLM cleanup that learns your voice; offline by default, with an 833-test suite.

title: debasish3807-afk/sona-ai-os
summary: Production-Ready Personal AI Operating System with Multi-Agent Intelligence, Memory, RAG, MCP Tools and Cloud AI Providers.

title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: zlatko-lakisic/agentic-orchestration
summary: Model-agnostic multi-agent orchestration built on CrewAI. YAML-driven agent and MCP catalogs, dynamic LLM planning, sessions, and pluggable execution — mix Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace, and your own tools without rewriting orchestration logic.

title: HontoUKI/M.A.R.I.A.-Micro-Engine
summary: Lightweight, character-pack driven chat engine with an OpenAI-compatible API — characters that visibly, explainably change as the relationship grows. Local (Ollama) or OpenAI.

title: epicsagas/claudy
summary: Claudy lets you switch between Anthropic, Z.AI, OpenRouter, Ollama, and custom endpoints with a single command — keeping credentials, config modes, and Claude frameworks cleanly isolated per profile.  Multi-provider · Config isolation · Channel bridge · Local agent bridge · Usage analytics

title: lidge-jun/opencodex
summary: Universal provider proxy for OpenAI Codex & Claude Code — use any LLM (Claude, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Ollama…) with Codex CLI, App, SDK, and Claude Code

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: xuiltul/animaworks
summary: Organization-as-Code for autonomous AI agents. Brain-inspired memory that grows, consolidates, and forgets. Multi-model (Claude/Codex/Gemini/Cursor/Ollama).

title: open-multi-agent/open-multi-agent
summary: TypeScript AI agent orchestration framework with dynamic workflows. Describe the goal, not the graph: a coordinator plans the task DAG at runtime and runs it on any LLM (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, or local models).

title: RikyZ90/ShibaClaw
summary: 🐕 Self-hosted security-first AI agent · 28 providers · 11 chat channels · WebUI · 3-level memory · task-schedule · automation · skills · MCP
